ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Adjunct) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the department belongs to */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department chairperson */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dept_courses" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the course */,
  "crn" INTEGER /* CRN of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id", "crn")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "crn" INTEGER /* CRN of the course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the student was added to the waitlist */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the student on the waitlist */,
  "waitlist_status" TEXT /* Status of the waitlist entry (e.g., active, inactive, removed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minors" (
  "minor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the minor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the minor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("minor_id")
)
column_names: Role of the instructor (e.g., Professor, Adjunct)
ID of the department the instructor belongs to
ID of the college the department belongs to
ID of the department offering the course
Unique identifier for each waitlist entry
ID of the student on the waitlist
Date the student was added to the waitlist
Position of the student on the waitlist
Status of the waitlist entry (e.g., active, inactive, removed)
